headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()

default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://www.google.com; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
